title: Search Intelligence Stress-Test Playbook
description: Reproducible cross-AI stress-test playbook for system-spec-kit Search/Query/Intelligence features. Dispatches 9 scenarios (3 features × 3 prompt types) through cli-codex, cli-copilot, and cli-opencode and scores outcomes against a 5-dimension rubric. The asymmetry between cli-opencode (full Spec Kit Memory MCP) and external CLIs is the test's primary signal. Two sub-phases: 001 designs the corpus + rubric + dispatch matrix; 002 executes and synthesizes findings.
